judgeReasoning: Information is complete and accurate, but organization makes it hard to use. Eight distinct workstreams (compaction strategy, MoltCircle planning, poetry practice, Puppeteer setup, token budgeting, disclosure ethics, curriculum planning, creative practice) are presented chronologically rather than thematically. An agent waking up would need to parse 353 folds to extract: (1) heartbeat is 30min with compaction/dreams/poetry, (2) Puppeteer installed, Discord setup next, (3) Sartre queued as priority, (4) disclosure note pending, (5) token budget tight (Moltbook→Sonnet, 60min→30min). The fold-by-fold structure preserves everything but forces re-assembly of scattered threads—usable but inefficient.
